mutations_applied: Mutation 1: EVAL4 B/W - Prohibit all color styling (style, classDef, fill: directives)
Mutation 2: EVAL1 Mermaid-only - Explicitly prohibit PlantUML, ASCII art, Draw.io, SVG, TikZ, Graphviz
Mutation 3: EVAL2 Numeral table ordering - MANDATORY table before any mermaid block
Mutation 4: EVAL3 Cross-figure consistency - Scan ALL figures, each numeral maps to exactly ONE component
